List datasets available through Shennong

Source: R/data_examples.R
sn_list_datasets.Rd

sn_list_datasets() returns a sample-level registry for datasets that can be loaded with sn_load_data. By default it reads the current Shennong public Zenodo collection, whose machine-readable index follows the UPLOAD_RULES.md layout stored in the record.

Usage

sn_list_datasets(
  source = c("public", "examples", "all"),
  record_id = NULL,
  save_dir = "~/.shennong/data",
  token = NULL,
  overwrite = FALSE,
  quiet = TRUE
)

Arguments

source

Which registry to list. "public" lists the current Shennong public Zenodo collection; "examples" lists the legacy PBMC examples; "all" returns both.

record_id

Zenodo record ID for the public Shennong collection. Defaults to option shennong.public_data_record or "20044788".

save_dir

Local cache directory used to store shennong_index.json.

token

Optional Zenodo access token for restricted/private records.

overwrite

Logical; if TRUE, re-download the public index.

quiet

Logical; if TRUE, suppress Zenodo download progress.

Value

A data frame with one row per loadable sample-level dataset.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
datasets <- sn_list_datasets()
head(datasets[, c("dataset", "study_id", "organism", "technology")])
} # }
